calendar.matters:
Osc. For Petition For Change Of Gender.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-28-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Petitioner: Kelly Watts, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jake Slyde Dontavion.
Decree signed in open court.
The Petition to Change Gender is continued to Feb. 28, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
